subject: Geology
title: Types of Tectonic Plates
description: Learn Types of Tectonic Plates in one minute.

hook.text: Some plates carry only ocean floor. Others carry continents. A few carry both. The difference matters a lot.

buildup.text: Oceanic plates are made of dense basaltic crust. Continental plates are made of lighter granitic crust.

discovery.text: Many plates, like the North American Plate, carry both oceanic and continental crust on the same slab.

twist.text: When an oceanic plate meets a continental one, the denser oceanic plate always sinks beneath. Density wins.

climax.text: The composition of a plate determines its fate at a boundary: whether it sinks, crumples, or slides past.

punchline.text: Density decides which plate goes under.

quiz.question: What happens when oceanic and continental plates meet?
options: The denser oceanic plate sinks beneath
